titleStmt.title: SII 27.39: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 39. (A.R. No. 588 of 1929-30.) BAILŪR, (NEAR BAḌAGABEṬṬU), COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Mahishāsuramardini temple.

This record registers a gift of income from taxes like samudāya, beḍuṅgōḷu, vosage and anāya accrued from Bayilūru to Vāsudēvamūḍala, by the chief queen Kikkāyi-Tāyi, in the presence of mahāpradhāna Vaijappa-daṇṇāyaka and the Nakharas and Haṁjamāna of Bārakūru.
The record is dated Śaka 1257, Yuva, Mīna 23, Friday. The tithi corresponded to 1226 A.D., March 17, when the weekday, however, was Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . svastiśrīmatu saka varuśa 125
7ne yuva saṁvatsara mīna māsa 23 śukravāra śrī matpā
ṁḍya cakravartti Arirāya basavasaṁkara rāya gajāṁrusa
śrīmatpratāpa cakravartti hoyisaṇa śrī vīra ballāḷa dēvarasa
ra paṭṭada piriyarasi kikkāyatāyiyara śrīpāda saṁ
nidhānadalu śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ vaijappa daṁṇā
yakarū bārakūra nakhara haṁjamāna Eraḍu nelabaḷi
samasta pradhānarugaḷu bāhattara niyōgigaḷū yiṁti
varugaḷu muṁtāgi śivaḷiya grāmada Ari Ippa
ttu Adhivāsadavoḷage mūḍillavara nālkūroḷagaṇa baya
lūriṁge grāma mariyādeyalu baṁdaṁthā samu
dāya beḍuṁgoḷu vosage Anāya modalāgi kikkā
yi tāyiyaru vāsadēva mūḍalavarige koṭaru I
kā ṁgeU barada kalliṁgeyū Arasiṁda Anusā
riyaṁda grāmadiṁda Idakke tappidaḍe vāraṇāsiya taṭada
li 1000 kavileya koṁda pāpa . grāmadaḷiU jananadakēḍu
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣarṣṭirvvaru
ṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . yi
dakke śrī hastada voppu . The following is engraved on the top of the slab: [brā]hmaṇada koṁḍa • •maṁgaḷa
Digital edition of SII 27.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
